description: Style Note Built with the breathability and zero-distraction Fit that athletes demand, these nike running shorts come in a body-friendly design and the DRI-FIT technology to keep you sweat-free and fresh all day. Team it with t-shirts and track jackets for a cool look.Product Details Black shorts, has an elasticated waist with a drawcord, contrast panel on the side seams, attached inner brief and nike swoosh on the left leg above the hemMaterial and Care 100% polyesterMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry lowCool iron do not iron on print/decoration Size and fitRegular fit
